creator: kristinacors
caption: Would you add this hotel to your bucket list! This is Part 6 of my series: Luxury Hotels For People Who Don’t Do Ordinary! Check out my playlist at th bottom of this video for the other hotels! #travelbucketlist #travelseries #travelcontentcreator #luxurytravel #luxuryhotels

transcription.text: Luxury hotels for people who don't do ordinary. If you want modern comfort, stunning interior, and the very best amenities, this is your go-to hotel. I'm talking sleek dice and blow dryers, heated toilets, a beautiful bathtub overlooking the mountains, beauty face masks, bath salts, a rejuvenating rain shower head, comfortable bed, and buttons to control everything from shades to mood lighting. Also, if you're someone that likes to spend time lounging on the property, the grounds are gorgeous, with a swimming pool, and projector screen for movie nights. And I love that they have beautiful animals roaming around the property, from bunny rabbits, parakeets, to even black swans. Also, they have a wine cellar, a tea room, and even costumes you can wear for photo shoots. They also have a bar and an incredible restaurant where you can try gourmet dishes inspired by traditional local cuisine. This is Beer Fish, which is super popular in Yangshuo. The name of this hotel is Jora Hotel, and again, it's located in Yangshuo, China. Share this with someone you want to go with, and follow for more! Thanks for watching!
